Creative.description: Seedance is ByteDance's advanced AI video generation model (successor to Kling). Seedance 2.0-based applications are expected to feature prominently in 2026, offering high-quality motion and character consistency for cinematic video creation.
Creative.creator: ByteDance

Creative.name: GLM-Image
Creative.tagline: Open-source industrial-grade AI image model
Creative.description: GLM-Image is a 16B parameter hybrid autoregressive + diffusion model with best-in-class text rendering. Open-source under Apache 2.0, it excels at text-heavy imagery like posters, infographics, and typography.
Creative.creator: Zhipu AI (Z.ai)

Creative.name: Topaz Photo AI
Creative.tagline: AI-powered photo enhancement and upscaling
Creative.description: Topaz Photo AI uses advanced AI models to enhance, denoise, and upscale photos. It can sharpen blurry images, remove noise from low-light photos, and upscale resolution up to 6x.
Creative.creator: Topaz Labs

Creative.name: Topaz Video AI
Creative.tagline: AI-powered video enhancement and upscaling
Creative.description: Topaz Video AI enhances and upscales video footage using AI models. It can upscale to 4K/8K, stabilize shaky footage, deinterlace, and create slow-motion effects.
Creative.creator: Topaz Labs

Creative.name: Artlist
Creative.tagline: AI-powered creative platform for video and music
Creative.description: Artlist is a creative platform offering royalty-free music, sound effects, stock footage, and AI-powered tools. Its AI features include music generation, video templates, and asset recommendations.
Creative.creator: Artlist

Creative.name: Soundraw
Creative.tagline: AI music generator for creators and businesses
Creative.description: Soundraw generates unique, royalty-free music using AI. Users can customize mood, genre, tempo, and instruments to create the perfect track for videos, podcasts, and commercial projects.
Creative.creator: Soundraw

Creative.name: Boomy
Creative.tagline: AI music creation and distribution platform
Creative.description: Boomy lets anyone create AI-generated songs in seconds and distribute them to streaming platforms like Spotify and Apple Music. It handles royalties and monetization for creators.
Creative.creator: Boomy Corporation

Creative.name: AIVA
Creative.tagline: AI music composition for creators and businesses
Creative.description: AIVA composes emotional, copyright-free music using AI. It's used by game developers, filmmakers, and content creators to generate original soundtracks in various styles and moods.
Creative.creator: AIVA Technologies

Creative.name: Riffusion
Creative.tagline: AI music generation from text prompts
Creative.description: Riffusion generates music from text prompts using a novel approach that creates audio spectrograms. It produces real-time music in various genres with an interactive web interface.
Creative.creator: Riffusion

Creative.name: Recraft
Creative.tagline: AI image and vector graphics generator for designers
Creative.description: Recraft generates high-quality images, icons, and vector graphics using AI. It's specifically designed for professional designers, offering consistent style generation and SVG export.
Creative.creator: Recraft

Creative.name: Framer AI
Creative.tagline: AI-powered website design and publishing
Creative.description: Framer AI generates complete, publishable websites from text descriptions. It creates responsive designs with animations, interactions, and CMS integration, ready to go live instantly.
Creative.creator: Framer

Creative.name: Uizard
Creative.tagline: AI-powered UI design from text or screenshots
Creative.description: Uizard transforms text descriptions, sketches, or screenshots into editable UI designs. It generates wireframes, prototypes, and design systems using AI, making design accessible to non-designers.
Creative.creator: Uizard

Creative.name: Looka
Creative.tagline: AI-powered logo and brand identity creator
Creative.description: Looka uses AI to generate professional logos and complete brand identities. It creates hundreds of logo variations and provides brand kits with business cards, social media assets, and more.
Creative.creator: Looka

Creative.name: Relume
Creative.tagline: AI website wireframe and sitemap generator
Creative.description: Relume generates website wireframes and sitemaps from text descriptions using AI. It creates complete site structures with page layouts, ready to export to Figma or Webflow.
Creative.creator: Relume

Creative.name: Luma Dream Machine
Creative.tagline: AI video generation with 3D-like animated styles
Creative.description: Luma Dream Machine generates high-quality AI videos with unique 3D-like animated styles. It creates realistic motion, consistent characters, and cinematic compositions from text and images.
Creative.creator: Luma AI

Creative.name: Filmora
Creative.tagline: AI-powered video editor for creators
Creative.description: Filmora by Wondershare is a video editor with extensive AI features including AI copywriting, smart cutout, motion tracking, audio ducking, and AI-powered color correction.
Creative.creator: Wondershare

Creative.name: Wondershare EdrawMax AI
Creative.tagline: AI-powered diagramming and visual collaboration
Creative.description: EdrawMax uses AI to generate diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, and organizational charts from text descriptions. It offers 280+ diagram types with AI-assisted creation and editing.
Creative.creator: Wondershare

Creative.name: Dzine (formerly Stockimg AI)
Creative.tagline: AI-powered graphic design and image generation
Creative.description: Dzine is an AI graphic design tool that generates logos, posters, book covers, and social media graphics. It combines AI image generation with professional design templates and editing tools.
Creative.creator: Dzine

Creative.name: Mubert
Creative.tagline: AI music generation for content creators
Creative.description: Mubert generates royalty-free, AI-created music streams and tracks for content creators. It offers mood-based generation, duration customization, and instant music for videos and streams.
Creative.creator: Mubert

Creative.name: Soundful
Creative.tagline: AI music studio for creators and brands
Creative.description: Soundful generates royalty-free background music using AI. It offers genre-based creation, mood customization, and one-click generation for videos, podcasts, and commercial projects.
Creative.creator: Soundful

Creative.name: Clipdrop
Creative.tagline: AI-powered image editing and generation toolkit
Creative.description: Clipdrop by Stability AI offers a suite of AI image tools including background removal, object cleanup, image upscaling, relighting, and text-to-image generation in one platform.
Creative.creator: Stability AI

Creative.name: Moonchild AI
Creative.tagline: AI-powered UX design and prototyping
Creative.description: Moonchild AI generates complete UX designs and prototypes from text descriptions. It creates user flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups with intelligent design suggestions.
